scope: Page 6/7 layout around Table 6 and the official-scene stability paragraph.
issue_before: Rendered page 7 started with the fragment nal/noMDL because original/noMDL fresh-process was split across a page boundary.

source_change.summary: Reworded the stability sentence to use 18 required paired runs in fresh processes across original/noMDL conditions, preserving the 18/18 result and the stability-only claim boundary.

pdftotext_check.page7_start_after_fix: complete successfully in fresh processes across original and noMDL conditions

visible_evidence: The page-7 first line no longer begins with nal/noMDL, process official-scene, or scene runs.
The paragraph still carries the same 18/18 official-scene success result and states that the evidence is for loadability and stability only.
Page 7 remains table-dense, but the correction removes the most obvious page-boundary word-fragment artifact.

claim_boundary.may_support: cleaner layout and wording for the official-scene stability result
